researchQuestion: How do Caribbean Reddit users perceive and resist narratives of US influence in the region?
threadTitle: How do you feel about the theories regarding US influence in the Caribbean?
aiGuidance: Focus assessment on whether the student identifies: (1) the distinction between 'influence' and 'control/colonialism' in Caribbean perspectives; (2) how Puerto Rico functions as a reference point for challenging statehood narratives; (3) the role of sovereignty and self-determination as core Caribbean values; (4) how historical knowledge (Monroe Doctrine, colonial history) shapes contemporary attitudes; (5) the intersection of race, immigration policy, and geopolitical power in Caribbean discourse.
